# Steady 2.20.3

- **System UI / Focus fix** — never shows “System UI isn’t available in Focus”; OS chrome is never locked or suspended
- League ads wait for a real load (up to ~15s) instead of instantly saying “not ready”
- Website download: short sponsor gate (“help Steady stay alive”) before the APK unlocks
- Published `app-ads.txt` for better AdMob fill
